title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. This comprehensive course covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. You'll build 15+ real-world projects and graduate job-ready.
imageAlt: Person coding on a laptop with HTML and JavaScript code on screen

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master user interface and experience design using Figma, Adobe XD, user research methods, wireframing, prototyping, and building scalable design systems used by top companies.
imageAlt: Designer working on UI wireframes and design components on a tablet

title: Digital Marketing Complete Guide
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, content marketing, paid ads, and growth hacking strategies used by top digital marketing agencies worldwide.
imageAlt: Digital marketing analytics dashboard showing graphs and social media metrics

title: Python for Data Science
description: Master Python programming, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, and machine learning fundamentals. Includes 10 real-world data analysis projects.
imageAlt: Python code and data visualization charts on a computer screen

title: React & Next.js Advanced Patterns
description: Deep dive into React advanced hooks, performance optimization, Server Components, Next.js App Router, streaming, caching, and production deployment strategies.
imageAlt: React and Next.js code displayed on a modern development environment

title: Graphic Design Fundamentals
description: Learn typography, color theory, visual composition, grid systems, branding fundamentals and practical skills using Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop and Canva.
imageAlt: Colorful graphic design mood board with typography samples and color palettes

title: Node.js & Express Backend Development
description: Build production-ready RESTful APIs, authentication systems, database integration with MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and deploy with Docker and cloud services.
imageAlt: Server rack and backend infrastructure representing Node.js server-side development

title: Social Media Marketing Pro
description: Grow brands and businesses on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn using proven organic and paid strategies. Includes content calendar templates and analytics dashboards.
imageAlt: Person scrolling through social media apps on a smartphone showing Instagram and TikTok
